quotes: "What i like about photographs is that they capture a moment that’s gone forever, impossible to reproduce."
author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes: A picture is a secret about a secret, the more it tells you the less you know
author: Diane Arbus

quotes: "Taking pictures is savoring life intensely, every hundredth of a second."
author: Marc Riboud

quotes: "You don't take a photograph, you make it."
author: Ansel Adams

quotes: "The camera is an instrument that teaches people how to see without a camera."
author: Dorothea Lange

quotes: "A good snapshot keeps a moment from running away."
author: Eudora Welty

quotes: "The Earth is Art, The Photographer is only a Witness"
author: Yann Arthus-Bertrand

quotes: "There are no rules for good photographs, there are only good photographs."
author: Ansel Adams

quotes: "There is nothing worse than a sharp image of a fuzzy concept."
author: Ansel Adams

quotes: "Photography is a reality so subtle that it becomes more real than reality"
author: Alfred Stieglitz
